sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The character is now very close to the yellow L-shape. Looking at the image, the character is just above and to the left of the yellow shape. Let me check the exact positions and move to touch/absorb the yellow shape.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if n['pixels'] > 5:
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash'][:8]}... bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
